member.name: T:FeeSchedule
member.summary:
The fee schedule for a specific hedera functionality and the time period this fee schedule will expire.
See Hedera Documentation

member.name: M:FeeSchedule.FromBytes(System.Byte[])
member.summary: Create a fee schedule from byte array.
member.exception: when there is an issue with the protobuf

member.name: M:FeeSchedule.FromProtobuf(Proto.FeeSchedule)
member.summary: Create a fee schedule from a protobuf.
